core.label: SystemVerilog Fundamentals
core.description: Enhanced Verilog for design and verification.

topics.label: SV vs Verilog
topics.description: SystemVerilog extends Verilog with OOP, assertions, and verification features.

topics.label: Data Types
topics.description: logic (replaces reg/wire), bit, byte, int, string, enum, struct, union, typedef.

topics.label: Interfaces
topics.description: interface for bundling signals between modules. Cleaner port connections.

topics.label: Classes & OOP
topics.description: class, extends, virtual, polymorphism. OOP for verification testbenches.

topics.label: Randomization
topics.description: rand, randc, constraint blocks. Generate random stimulus for verification.

topics.label: Assertions (SVA)
topics.description: assert property, sequence, property. Formal and simulation-based checking.

topics.label: Coverage
topics.description: covergroup, coverpoint, cross. Measure verification completeness.

topics.label: Queues & Dynamic Arrays
topics.description: Dynamic arrays, associative arrays, and queues. Flexible data structures.
